- same 4 instruments

options.description: An LLM scores extraneous-load features + readability metrics; comprehension via auto-graded probes. Fully scalable A/B. Weakness: a proxy — must be validated against human ratings first.
options.preview:
Pipeline scores each output:
- structure/scent features
- Flesch-Kincaid, chunk size
- auto-graded probe accuracy
→ proxy-PEI, run on 100s of outputs

options.label: Hybrid: solo + LLM proxy
options.description: Iterate fast with the automated proxy, spot-check with your own self-ratings to keep the proxy honest. Best speed/validity tradeoff for one person.

correlate proxy vs self,
recalibrate proxy weights
